lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Hello hello, friends! Welcome back to Pip and Bean!

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Today we're off to the sunniest place in town... the playground! And guess who's already here?

lines.speaker: pip
lines.text: I'm Pip!

lines.speaker: bean
lines.text: And I'm Bean!

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Pip loves to bounce. Bounce, bounce, bounce!

lines.speaker: pip
lines.text: Wheeee!

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: And Bean loves to build. Castles, towers, anything at all!

lines.speaker: bean
lines.text: Ta-da! A sandcastle!

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: And right in the middle of the playground stands... the Great Big Slide! The shiniest, twistiest slide you've ever seen.

lines.speaker: pip
lines.text: Race you to the top!

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: But wait. Who's that walking through the gate?

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: It's a new kid. His name is Milo. And hmm... he doesn't look very happy.

lines.speaker: milo
lines.text: Out of my way! ME first!

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Oh no. Milo pushed right to the front of the line!

lines.speaker: pip
lines.text: Hey! We were waiting our turn...

lines.speaker: milo
lines.text: Too bad! It's MY slide now.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: And that wasn't all. Down in the sandbox...

lines.speaker: milo
lines.text: Gimme that bucket!

lines.speaker: bean
lines.text: But... I was using it...

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Oh dear. And then, crunch! Milo stomped right through Bean's beautiful sandcastle.

lines.speaker: bean
lines.text: My castle...

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: The whole playground went quiet. Even the sun hid behind a cloud.

lines.speaker: pip
lines.text: Bean, are you okay?

lines.speaker: bean
lines.text: I'm sad, Pip. Why is Milo so mean?

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Pip thought, and thought... and then Pip looked over at Milo.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Milo was sitting all alone under the big oak tree. No friends. No one to play with. Not even one.

lines.speaker: pip
lines.text: Bean... look. Milo is all by himself.

lines.speaker: bean
lines.text: Maybe... maybe he doesn't know HOW to make friends.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Sometimes, when someone acts grumpy on the outside, they're really just lonely on the inside.

lines.speaker: pip
lines.text: I have an idea. Come on!

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: So Pip and Bean took a deep breath, and walked right up to Milo.

lines.speaker: pip
lines.text: Hi Milo! We're building a GIANT sandcastle. Want to help?

lines.speaker: milo
lines.text: You... want to play... with ME? But I was mean to you.

lines.speaker: bean
lines.text: Everyone makes mistakes. Here, you can use my favorite bucket.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: And do you know what happened next? Milo's frown wibbled... and wobbled... and turned all the way upside down!

lines.speaker: milo
lines.text: I'm sorry I pushed. I'm sorry I grabbed. Can we start again?

lines.speaker: pip
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: bean
lines.text: That's what friends do!

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Together they built the biggest, tallest, sparkliest sandcastle the playground had ever seen.

lines.speaker: milo
lines.text: And Bean, you put the flag on top. You're the best builder!

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Then they zoomed down the Great Big Slide, all three together!

lines.speaker: pip
lines.text: Wheeee!

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: The sun came back out, warm and bright. Because kindness, my friends... kindness is sunshine you can share.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: So let's remember Pip and Bean's three magic moves for the playground.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: One: Take turns! Waiting is easier when we do it together.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Two: Share! Toys are twice the fun with a friend.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Three: Say sorry! A little sorry can fix a big mistake.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Being kind turns a grumpy day... into a sunshine day!

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Thanks for playing with us on Pip and Bean! Give a big thumbs up, and we'll see you next time. Say bye, everyone!

lines.speaker: pip
lines.text: Bye-bye!

lines.speaker: bean
lines.text: See you soon, friends!

lines.speaker: milo
lines.text: Bring your kindness!
